sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106514" key="u(eloyiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑελ-οψικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ὑελέψης</etym>) <sense id="n106514.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of a glass-smelter,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">καμίνια</foreign> Zos.Alch.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg9010.tlg001:p.246B" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.246B.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
